description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on every push. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with Python versions 3.8 through 3.12. For each version, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies including ghostscript and imagemagick, run make test-ref, test with tox, generate a coverage report, and upload it to Coveralls using the COVERALLS_REPO_TOKEN from secrets.
